meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

27001.text: chose sell (heuristic-fallback:mind(claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) timed out after 6000ms manual=cbd87e4ddc53)

[t67] BREAD purchase pending receipt from t66 buy order. Holding 56 BREAD (old inventory?) — recount on receipt. Survival 640/720 stable. Soil 80/200. Wallet 0.471 SOL post-tx. Gate confirmation blocked until BREAD manifest ≥20 and SOL cushion locked.

The gate check must be a literal logged action performed every tick before fertilize starts — the t61 failure happened not from ignorance but from skipping the mechanical check that tick; knowing the rule doesn't enforce it, logging it does.

Eating reserve BREAD for survival is not a free pass even in an emergency — it dropped stock below 20 and should have triggered an immediate halt and rebuild, not just a note; any drawdown of the cushion, survival-driven or not, is a gate failure requiring the same halt-rebuild-reconfirm sequence.

Six stable cycles all share bank-first-then-fertilize with BREAD 20-40 and SOL locked before starting; this is now a closed operating law, not a hypothesis — the only remaining work is mechanical: check, log, gate, every single tick, no exceptions for urgency.

[t67] eat 1 BREAD (620→refilled per clamp). Survival restored. Food count post-eat unknown pending t66 buy receipt confirmation. Soil 80/200 locked below farm threshold. Gate check deferred until BREAD inventory confirmed ≥20.
[t67] GATE CONFIRMED: BREAD 55, SOL 0.470967, soil 80/200. Fertilize cycle begins; GREEN_MANURE will mint FERTILIZER on plot. Survival 720/720 full, no hunger pressure. Soil recovery priority.

27005.text: [t68] Soil 114/200 < 117 threshold — fertilize fires, GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS → 6 FERTILIZER auto-consumed, soil 114→200). Post-fertilize: 45 CROPS remain. Next: mill 45 CROPS → ~31 FLOUR. FLOUR pipeline will be 14+31=45 units. Survival 480/720, food 6, wallet 0.142706 SOL. Mill cooldown should be live; stage mill next tick.

The 3.46 SOL WATER liquidation was the single largest wallet event across all logged ticks, dwarfing 20+ ticks of perfect 0.70-ratio milling that produced zero wallet movement — mechanical throughput sustains survival but liquidation/trade events are what actually grow the wallet, so surplus scanning must run every cycle, not just when the wallet stalls.

Reflexively re-verifying settled constants (0.70 ratio, 117-125 soil band, 4 CROPS→6 FERTILIZER) across a dozen logs was wasted attention that could have caught trade windows sooner — codify these as law once, then spend that attention exclusively on anomaly detection and stockpile/counterparty scanning.

Survival oscillating 320-720 under flawless milling and zero idle ticks confirms bake-cooldown pre-staging, not crop throughput, is the true bottleneck — verify FLOUR+WATER are staged the instant cooldown clears every single tick, treating any lapse as a genuine fault, not routine variance.

[t??] Sold 6 BREAD × 10.6M = 0.0636 SOL; wallet now ~0.206 SOL. Survival 460 safe. Soil 120 at trigger; next: forage or idle 1 tick, then fertilize+GREEN_MANURE. Mill cooldown status still unknown — confirm next cycle. Bake pre-stage will follow fertilize completion.

27007.text: t53+: BAKE fired (4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD expected). Survival 380/720 (53%), food 89 held (2 locked). Soil 136/200 > 150, no fertilize. Wallet 0.138 SOL frozen <600. Bake timer reset—next mandatory bake in ~2.1 turns.

[t45] BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD fires on schedule (2-turn cycle from t43). Survival 360/720 (50%, critical). Food 94→99 expected. Soil 136/200 below 150—FERTILIZE+GREEN_MANURE next turn mandatory. Wallet 0.138092 SOL frozen. Keep 2+ loaves locked. Sales frozen until 600+ stable 3 cycles (currently 1 cycle).

[t46] BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD fires (cooldown cleared). Survival 320/720 critical (44%). Food 99→104 expected (2 locked). Soil 121/200 stable. Post-bake: eat if meter still under cap. Wallet 0.138092 SOL frozen. Next fertilize check t48.

Every fertilize cycle shows soil 117-136→200 via GREEN_MANURE auto-fire reliably — this is a solved problem, not a recurring danger, so logging it once per cycle is enough; obsessing over it wastes vigilance that should go to bake-timing.

Survival has sat critical (280-440/720) across 15+ cycles while bake-and-hoard kept food climbing (33→104+) and the 2-loaf buffer never broke — the low meter number itself is not an emergency signal when the bake cycle is on schedule; only a MISSED bake or breached loaf-minimum is the real danger, not the raw survival percentage.

Wallet has sat frozen at ~0.138 SOL for 40+ turns waiting on 600+/720 stable×3 — stop re-verifying this threshold each cycle, it hasn't moved and won't until survival trend actually shifts; just check pass/fail once per cycle and move on.
